assertionResults.fullName: BusinessDomainPermanentDeleteModal Rendering renders nothing when isOpen=false
assertionResults.title: renders nothing when isOpen=false

assertionResults.fullName: BusinessDomainPermanentDeleteModal Rendering renders nothing when domain=null
assertionResults.title: renders nothing when domain=null

assertionResults.fullName: BusinessDomainPermanentDeleteModal Rendering renders the dialog when isOpen=true and domain is set
assertionResults.title: renders the dialog when isOpen=true and domain is set

assertionResults.fullName: BusinessDomainPermanentDeleteModal Rendering displays the domain name in the danger label
assertionResults.title: displays the domain name in the danger label

assertionResults.fullName: BusinessDomainPermanentDeleteModal Rendering shows an irreversible warning
assertionResults.title: shows an irreversible warning

assertionResults.fullName: BusinessDomainPermanentDeleteModal Rendering renders the confirmation input field
assertionResults.title: renders the confirmation input field

assertionResults.fullName: BusinessDomainPermanentDeleteModal Name confirmation logic delete button is disabled initially (empty input)
assertionResults.title: delete button is disabled initially (empty input)

assertionResults.fullName: BusinessDomainPermanentDeleteModal Name confirmation logic delete button remains disabled when input does NOT match (case-sensitive)
assertionResults.title: delete button remains disabled when input does NOT match (case-sensitive)

assertionResults.fullName: BusinessDomainPermanentDeleteModal Name confirmation logic delete button remains disabled for partial input
assertionResults.title: delete button remains disabled for partial input

assertionResults.fullName: BusinessDomainPermanentDeleteModal Name confirmation logic delete button is ENABLED when input exactly matches domain.name
assertionResults.title: delete button is ENABLED when input exactly matches domain.name

assertionResults.fullName: BusinessDomainPermanentDeleteModal Name confirmation logic shows "Name does not match" hint for wrong input
assertionResults.title: shows "Name does not match" hint for wrong input

assertionResults.fullName: BusinessDomainPermanentDeleteModal Name confirmation logic shows confirmed hint when name matches
assertionResults.title: shows confirmed hint when name matches

assertionResults.fullName: BusinessDomainPermanentDeleteModal Delete action calls permanentDeleteDomain with correct id and confirmationName on submit
assertionResults.title: calls permanentDeleteDomain with correct id and confirmationName on submit

assertionResults.fullName: BusinessDomainPermanentDeleteModal Delete action calls onDeleted and onClose after successful deletion
assertionResults.title: calls onDeleted and onClose after successful deletion

assertionResults.fullName: BusinessDomainPermanentDeleteModal Delete action does NOT call onDeleted when API call fails
assertionResults.title: does NOT call onDeleted when API call fails

assertionResults.title: calls onClose when Cancel button is clicked

assertionResults.title: calls onClose when X button is clicked
